w:r.w:t: This document serves as the formal readiness assessment for Sprint 06.
The objective is to determine whether the Snapflect platform is sufficiently prepared to begin implementation of the Assessment Execution Business Logic Program.
Algorithm implementation must be consistent across future releases.
Timing bugs can affect assessment integrity.
These are implementation enhancements, not blockers.
UI scaffolding complete but dependent on backend implementation.
All critical prerequisites have been completed:
Sprint 06 is formally authorized to begin implementation.
The Snapflect Assessment Portal has completed all planning and readiness activities required to begin implementation of its first major business logic program.
